description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is on the Games page
AND the user has selected the Calendar

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to the past month button [<]
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Month Navigation, <current_month>, <current_year>, Left Button, press select to navigate to the previous month, Press right to navigate to the next month, Press down to navigate to dates in this month."
